mode_rationale: Per the phase guard (phase=LIVE, simulation=false, start_date set) this run is nominally LIVE. However NO lead source is provisioned for the villa campaign and NO Google Sheets / Drive MCP connector is reachable in this scheduled session, so live polling is physically impossible. This run additionally probed the two reachable connectors (Gmail, Supabase) to confirm no leads are silently capturable elsewhere. No leads were read, recorded, or escalated. Producing a readiness report is the correct output.
note_on_run_time: Cron drift unchanged for the eleventh consecutive LEAD_CHECK run. Job fires ~08:03 PHT (00:03 UTC) instead of the documented 13:00 PHT slot. Recommendation unchanged: align the scheduled-tasks cron with the documented PHT slot, or rewrite the agent prompt to reflect the actual fire time.

gmail.query: newer_than:14d (lead OR inquiry OR villa OR contact form OR Panglao OR investment OR Hebrew equivalents)
gmail.note: No website contact-form lead notifications, no inbound inquiry emails for the villa campaign in the last 14 days. The only Panglao-related items are Google Drive share-request notifications. NEW FINDING: a Drive share notification dated 2026-05-24 references a sheet titled 'PANGLAO PRIME VILLAS — LEAD PIPELINE' owned by ceo@blue-everest.com. The intended lead-capture sheet appears to EXIST, but it is not registered in lead_check_state.json (sheet_id/tab_name still null) and no Sheets/Drive MCP is authorized to open it in this session.

supabase.note: Six Supabase projects are visible (4-Storey Pampanga Dashboard, btce, Babycon, bmc-os, blueprint-HR, Blueprint finance). None is a Blue Everest / Panglao Prime Villas lead database. Per CLAUDE.md Rule 6, Blueprint-owned databases are out of scope and were not queried for lead data.

google_sheets.note: A lead sheet 'PANGLAO PRIME VILLAS — LEAD PIPELINE' (owner ceo@blue-everest.com) is evidenced by a 2026-05-24 Drive share notification, but (1) no Google Sheets/Drive MCP connector is present in this session's tool inventory, (2) lead_check_state.json.lead_source_sheet is null on all three fields, and (3) header_row_validated=false. There is nothing this agent can poll. Required before LIVE polling works: authorize a Sheets/Drive MCP for unattended scheduled access, register sheet_id + tab_name in lead_check_state.json against the expected schema, and set header_row_validated=true.

wati.note: campaign_state.json platforms.wati.status='not_setup'. No account, no Client ID, no registered sales-agent WA number. Consequence: inbound WhatsApp lead ingestion is unavailable AND outbound HOT-lead escalation to the sales agent CANNOT be automated. If a HOT lead arrived today it could not be alerted through WATI.

hubspot.note: campaign_state.json platforms.hubspot.status='not_setup'. No CRM destination, no deal pipeline, no owner routing.

brevo.note: campaign_state.json platforms.brevo.status reads 'active' (templates=10, lists=5, drip_sequence=true). No Brevo MCP is reachable to verify, and LEAD_CHECK does not write to Brevo. Confirm the account/lists/drip exist before treating the lead -> email-nurture path as functional.

meta_lead_ads.note: Meta Ads MCP is reachable. Two campaigns (IL-1, PH-1) are marked ACTIVE, but the ad account carries account_issue 'UNSETTLED - billing balance must be paid before ads deliver', so delivery (and therefore lead generation) is itself in question. No Meta Lead Ads forms exist and no lead-form-to-sheet/CRM bridge is configured.

blockers: No Google Sheets/Drive MCP connector authorized in this session; the 'PANGLAO PRIME VILLAS — LEAD PIPELINE' sheet exists but cannot be opened or registered.
WATI not_setup: no inbound WhatsApp capture and no automated HOT-lead escalation path to the sales agent.
HubSpot not_setup: no CRM persistence beyond _completed/{date}/ files.
Brevo status 'active' per state file but unverified this run.
Meta ad account UNSETTLED: billing balance must be paid before ads deliver, so paid lead generation is itself in doubt.

UNCONFIRMED STATE FLIP persists: campaign_state.json has been LIVE / simulation=false since the 2026-06-03 overnight update with no staged task queue and no human sign-off found in the project tree (now 5 days).
suggested_actions: Authorize a Google Sheets (or Drive) MCP connector for unattended scheduled runs, then register the 'PANGLAO PRIME VILLAS — LEAD PIPELINE' sheet_id and tab_name in _status/lead_check_state.json and set header_row_validated=true.
Validate the sheet header row against expected_lead_schema before the first live poll.
Stand up WATI (account + Client ID + sales-agent WA number) so HOT-lead escalation can be automated; until then HOT leads must be escalated manually.
Confirm whether the 2026-06-03 LIVE flip was intentional and human-authorized. If not, revert campaign_state.json to PRE_LAUNCH / simulation=true until at least one lead source is live.
Settle the Meta ad account billing balance so ads can deliver and generate leads.
Fix the LEAD_CHECK cron so it fires at the documented 13:00 PHT slot (currently ~08:03 PHT).

state_writes.lead_check_state_json: NOT MODIFIED (outside this agent's write scope per CLAUDE.md; only _completed/ and _status/cowork_heartbeat.json are writable). last_check intentionally remains null since no successful poll occurred.

hebrew_summary: סיכום בדיקת לידים 2026-06-07 (יום קמפיין 11): המערכת מסומנת LIVE (simulation=false), אבל אין מקור לידים שניתן לקרוא ממנו עבור קמפיין הווילות. נבדקו שני המחברים הזמינים: Gmail - לא נמצאו פניות לידים או התראות טופס יצירת קשר ב-14 הימים האחרונים; כן נמצאה התראת שיתוף מ-24.05 על גיליון בשם 'PANGLAO PRIME VILLAS — LEAD PIPELINE' בבעלות ceo@blue-everest.com. כלומר הגיליון קיים, אבל אינו רשום ב-lead_check_state.json ואין מחבר Google Sheets/Drive מורשה כדי לפתוח אותו. Supabase - שישה פרויקטים גלויים, כולם של Blueprint/עסקים אחרים, אין מסד נתוני לידים של Blue Everest (ולפי כלל 6 אסור לגעת בנתוני Blueprint). WATI ו-HubSpot עדיין לא מוגדרים, ולכן אין קליטת לידים בוואטסאפ ואין הסלמה אוטומטית של ליד חם לסוכן המכירות. חשבון המודעות במטא עדיין UNSETTLED. מה צריך כדי להתחיל: לחבר מחבר Google Sheets, לרשום את ה-sheet_id ושם הטאב, לאמת את שורת הכותרות מול הסכמה, להקים WATI, ולאשר אם המעבר ל-LIVE מ-03.06 היה מכוון. לא נקלטו, נרשמו או הוסלמו לידים בריצה זו.
